title: jasminum officinale var. affine
intro: Jasminum officinale var. affine, also known as star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a fragrant, flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Jasminum officinale var. affine include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, while also being used to treat skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
